FirewallD.PassthroughRemovedc
 PK_ACTION_ALL implies all other actions, i.e. once a subject is
            authorized for PK_ACTION_ALL it's also authorized for any other action.
            Use-case is GUI (RHBZ#994729).
        Nr2
authorizeAll
